title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
snippet: OKX is bringing together payments, identity and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
snippet: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.
